results.title: Costa Rica Mangrove Bees Create Unique Honey in Puntarenas
results.description: Families in El Establo de Pitahaya, Puntarenas, are building a small community business around one of Costa Rica’s more unusual local products: honey made by bees living beside the mangrove. The project, known as ApiMangle, brings together beekeeping, mangrove conservation and rural tourism in a coastal community where many residents have long depended on fishing, [...] The post Costa Rica Mangrove Bees Create Unique Honey in Puntarenas appeared first on The Tico Times | Costa Rica News | Travel | Real Estate .

results.title: At least 90 dead in China's worst coal mine disaster in over 16 years - Sat, 23 May 2026 PST
results.description: SHANGHAI – At least 90 people were killed in a gas explosion at a coal mine in China’s northern province of Shanxi, the country’s deadliest mining accident since at least 2009.

results.title: Venezuela’s Machado vows another run for presidency and eyes a return from exile by end of 2026
results.description: PANAMA CITY, Panama (AP) — Venezuela’s Nobel Peace Prize laureate María Corina Machado announced on Saturday that she plans to run for president again and intends to return to her home country before the end of 2026. results.title: Meyer and Hicks lead the Marlins to a 4-1 win over the punchless Mets
results.description: MIAMI (AP) — Max Meyer threw seven shutout innings of one-hit ball, Liam Hicks homered twice and the Miami Marlins beat the punchless New York Mets 4-1 on Saturday.
